stadium.name: The Serpent's Pass
stadium.location: Zmeigorod, just west of the lumber mill
stadium.description: Has to be periodically rebuilt whenever the old stadium starts sinking into the swamp. Don’t worry about it.

stats.pregame_ritual: Rubbing a foul-smelling local mushroom on their elbows for flexibility.
Chugging a raw egg, shell and all.
Performing a series of aggressive, theatrical poses.
Polishing their helmet with a live snail for good luck.
Tensing every muscle in their body at once, then releasing.
Performing a series of aggressive, theatrical poses.
Clapping their hands a prime number of times.
Sharing a ceremonial, non-alcoholic grog from a communal cup.
Looking each teammate in the eye and giving a single, firm nod.
Giving the Trollball a heroic backstory before each game.
Painting a single, matching stripe of mud on each player's face.
Polishing their helmet with a live snail for good luck.
Tensing every muscle in their body at once, then releasing.
Performing a series of aggressive, theatrical poses.
Sharing a ceremonial, non-alcoholic grog from a communal cup.

Performing a series of aggressive, theatrical poses.
Clapping their hands a prime number of times.
Chugging a raw egg, shell and all.

stadium.name: The Stronghold Bailey
stadium.description: The team plays in the central bailey of Stronghold Castle, a massive fortress built on a plateau overlooking the city. The field is packed earth and cobblestone, and the crowd watches from the surrounding stone ramparts.

stats.pregame_ritual: Leading the team in a synchronized chant that slowly gets louder.
Searching for a four-leaf clover near the sidelines.
Reciting a short, epic poem about a past victory.
Sharing a piece of fermented fish with a teammate.
Listening to the wind for a sign of which way the game will turn.
Eating a piece of honeycomb to 'sweeten' their victory.
Collecting a pebble from every field they've ever played on.
Tugging on their left earlobe three times.
Seeing who on the team can belch the loudest.
Tying a red string around their pinky finger.
Sharing a piece of fermented fish with a teammate.
Searching for a four-leaf clover near the sidelines.

preGame: Folks, gather 'round! Let the trumpets BLOW and let the thunder ROAR! Tonight on the legendary plane of Osterra, deep within the treacherous confines of The Serpent's Pass, we witness the Grand Finals Bracket Reset! It is the clash of titans, the ultimate trial by combat! On the home side, battling the dreadful pull of Altitude Sickness and dodging the fury of the Sudden Downpour, it is The Zmeigorod Snessengers! These champions of The Grove have proven their might, drawing the greatest adoration across the realm, but can they withstand the onslaught? And staring across the cobblestone maw of The Serpent's Pass, prepared to shake the very foundations of this ancient ground, are The New Ravenfall Commanders of Eponore! These valiant challengers are hungry, they are fierce, and they seek to claim the undisputed mantle of Trollball supremacy! Before the whistle even blows, the Commander's maestro, Moir Sass, is seen performing her sacred rite—reciting a short, epic poem of past triumphs! A declaration of war, if ever there was one! Will the Ravenfall Commanders manage to claw their way out of the mire and into the scoring zone, or will the Snessengers, who carry the devotion of the multitudes, crush them beneath their massive, mud-caked boots? Goodness, I tell ya, this is going to be a riot of leather, sinew, and pure, unadulterated mayhem!
postGame: WHAT A SPECTACLE! WHAT A THUNDERING, SLUDGE-SLOSHING, BLOOD-SOAKED MASTERPIECE OF TROLLBALL! The Serpent's Pass delivered everything it promised! The rockslide threat, the downpour, the sheer, crushing weight of altitude—it was a gauntlet of agony for every warrior upon that field! And though the valiant New Ravenfall Commanders put up a fight worthy of the finest adventurers rescued from the Demon Prison, they could not pierce the glorious, impenetrable wall of the Zmeigorod Snessengers! The action was relentless! Kleinstein MacGregor, the magnificent beast from the home squad, fired a shot from the heart of the field and sunk it! A two-point bomb that shook the very foundations of the castle walls! Then, Delija Dowling, battling the dreadful altitude, drove through the muck, lumbered across the line, and DUNKD IT INTO THE GOAL for the vital one-pointer! Three points! The Snessengers take the lead! We saw the brutal reality of this game in every tackle! Evalyn Pierrepont was injured by the Loredo brute, while Pirozzo Opal was brought down by Avaria Revell's ferocity! And the Commanders' finest, Jessalin Zobias, was downed by Northway Orran! But even in the deluge, the spirit of the Snessengers burns brightest! The ravenfall crew looked magnificent, but their efforts were simply drowned out by the sheer, glorious, primal power of The Grove's warriors! The final tally stands at The Zmeigorod Snessengers three, and The New Ravenfall Commanders at zero! The Snessengers have claimed this round, proving once more that brute force, combined with sheer, glorious grit, conquers all! May the Ebon Gate Corruptors watch this display and weep with envy, for tonight, the Zmeigorod Snessengers reigned supreme!
